1/2/3/4: tabs  │  tab: next field  │  ctrl+s: send  │  ctrl+p: preview  │  ctrl+a: attach  │  r: refresh  │  c: chat  │ [120D[2K[?2004l[?25h[?1002l[?1003l[?1006l
